subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, my Lord and my King, my Master, my Support and my Hope! I beseech Thee by the waves of the sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی و مالکی و سلطانی و سیدی و سندی و رجائی اسئلک بامواج بحر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @living waters; water of life
